--- title: "IMQDelay class | @imqueue/rpc 3.2.1" --- {% raw %}

Home > @imqueue/rpc > IMQDelay

IMQDelay class

Represents a delay expressed as a numeric timer value in a given time unit. Used to defer IMQ request processing.

Signature:

export declare class IMQDelay

Constructors

Constructor

Modifiers

Description

(constructor)(timer, unit)

Constructs a new instance of the IMQDelay class

Property

Modifiers

Type

Description

ms

readonly

number

Returns this delay converted to milliseconds.

{number}

timer

number

unit

'ms' | 's' | 'm' | 'h' | 'd'
